evidence_quotes.quote: Would it be possible to add something to the Digital Fairness Act here, so that there would also be coverage against game producers who close down games servers without allowing for an alternative?
As it stands, games like red dead online can be shut down without any warning, which would mean that those who bought the game would no longer be able to use it in any way.

paragraphs.text: Would it be possible to add something to the Digital Fairness Act here, so that there would also be coverage against game producers who close down games servers without allowing for an alternative? As it stands, games like red dead online can be shut down without any warning, which would mean that those who bought the game would no longer be able to use it in any way.
